name: vintrace
description: Consent-gated local MCP access to Vintrace enrollment, scanning, Safe Mode, review queues, metrics, and audit context.
long_description: Vintrace exposes a local, review-first face-recognition workbench to MCP clients. Agents can read project state, enroll consented references, scan image and video folders, inspect Safe Mode assessments, triage review candidates, export reports, audit workspace health, and update review decisions only with explicit confirmation for destructive or decision-changing actions.

tools.name: get_project_state
tools.description: Read a compact workspace summary with consent, counts, engine, Safe Mode, and thresholds.

tools.name: set_workspace
tools.description: Switch the active Vintrace workspace directory.

tools.name: mark_consent
tools.description: Record whether the operator has consent before image or video processing.

tools.name: enroll_reference_folder
tools.description: Enroll reference images for one person and one age bucket.

tools.name: enroll_age_reference_set
tools.description: Enroll child, adolescent, adult, or unknown reference folders for the same person.

tools.name: scan_folder
tools.description: Scan an image/video folder, emit progress, and queue matched or clustered review candidates.

tools.name: scan_media_paths
tools.description: Scan explicit image or video paths, emit progress, and queue review candidates.

tools.name: scan_image_paths
tools.description: Compatibility alias for scanning explicit media paths.

tools.name: cancel_active_scan
tools.description: Request cancellation of the active scan, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: pause_active_scan
tools.description: Pause the active scan between files, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: resume_active_scan
tools.description: Resume a paused scan.

tools.name: scan_job_status
tools.description: Read active scan controls and latest resumable scan status.

tools.name: analyze_folder
tools.description: Preflight a folder before scanning with media counts, sample readability, and recommendations.

tools.name: probe_video_file
tools.description: Probe one video file for decoder support, dimensions, frame count, and duration.

tools.name: assess_image
tools.description: Assess whether one image is eligible and whether Safe Mode would protect it.

tools.name: review_candidate
tools.description: Set a review candidate status after human review, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: bulk_review_candidates
tools.description: Set the same human-reviewed status on multiple candidates, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: set_candidate_note
tools.description: Save an operator note on a review candidate.

tools.name: block_false_match
tools.description: Reject and suppress an exact image/person false-match pair, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: reassign_candidate_person
tools.description: Move one candidate row to another person label, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: query_candidates
tools.description: Page and search review candidates without loading the full queue.

tools.name: clear_review_queue
tools.description: Clear queued candidates, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: purge_reviewed_candidates
tools.description: Remove reviewed candidates from the active queue while preserving audit records, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: workspace_health
tools.description: Audit workspace health, missing files, duplicate rows, storage footprint, and cleanup recommendations.

tools.name: repair_workspace
tools.description: Preview or repair missing saved-photo and match links; changes require confirm=true.

tools.name: database_integrity
tools.description: Run SQLite integrity and foreign-key checks for the active workspace index.

tools.name: repair_database_integrity
tools.description: Snapshot and repair the local SQLite index; changes require confirm=true.

tools.name: relink_workspace_paths
tools.description: Relink saved photo/video paths after a library folder has moved; changes require confirm=true.

tools.name: duplicate_people
tools.description: Find enrolled person labels that may represent the same person.

tools.name: read_audit_events
tools.description: Read recent audit events with pagination.

tools.name: purge_duplicate_candidates
tools.description: Compact duplicate candidate rows while preserving the strongest candidate, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: purge_old_candidates
tools.description: Purge reviewed candidates older than a retention window while preserving audit records, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: delete_reference
tools.description: Delete one enrolled reference, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: delete_person
tools.description: Delete all references and queued candidates for one person, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: rename_person
tools.description: Rename or merge one person label into another person label, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: clear_references
tools.description: Delete all references, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: save_settings
tools.description: Update thresholds, clustering minimum, Safe Mode settings, storage budget, large-file guard, scan exclusions, and review rules.

tools.name: set_performance_mode
tools.description: Set the scan and UI performance profile to auto, fast, balanced, or quality.

tools.name: apply_review_rules
tools.description: Apply saved auto-triage review rules to pending candidates, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: calibration_summary
tools.description: Return the local calibration summary from accepted/rejected review decisions.

tools.name: accuracy_evaluation
tools.description: Evaluate local precision/recall from accepted and rejected review decisions.

tools.name: export_accuracy_labels
tools.description: Export accepted/rejected review labels to JSON and CSV.

tools.name: import_accuracy_labels
tools.description: Import local ground-truth label rows, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: apply_calibration
tools.description: Apply local review feedback to matching thresholds, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: export_review_report
tools.description: Export a JSON audit report and CSV candidate table into the workspace exports folder.

tools.name: export_workspace_inventory
tools.description: Export source-folder inventory, saved references, and review rows without media files.

tools.name: export_audit_log
tools.description: Export the full local activity log to JSON and CSV.

tools.name: export_consent_receipt
tools.description: Export a consent receipt with policy and counts, without photos, thumbnails, vectors, or model files.

tools.name: retention_policy_report
tools.description: Report reviewed-match retention windows, generated data size, and cleanup recommendations.

tools.name: export_safe_mode_audit
tools.description: Export Safe Mode policy, model status, cache counts, and protected-media scan totals.

tools.name: model_drift_report
tools.description: Report references or review rows created with a different active face model.

tools.name: reference_gap_report
tools.description: Report which saved people need clearer, side-angle, multi-age, or refreshed reference photos.

tools.name: export_review_ledger
tools.description: Export review decision metadata and audit events without media, thumbnails, vectors, or model files.

tools.name: export_scan_history
tools.description: Export scan run history to JSON and CSV for performance and support review.

tools.name: export_workspace_backup
tools.description: Export a ZIP backup of workspace metadata and audit logs; generated files require confirm=true.

tools.name: verify_workspace_backup
tools.description: Verify a Vintrace workspace backup ZIP before sharing or archiving it.

tools.name: restore_workspace_backup
tools.description: Restore a verified Vintrace workspace backup ZIP into an empty target folder, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: prune_workspace_backups
tools.description: Remove older workspace backup ZIPs while keeping the newest backups, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: prune_scan_manifests
tools.description: Remove older resumable scan manifest rows while keeping the newest runs, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: export_selected_candidates
tools.description: Export selected candidate rows to JSON and CSV in the workspace exports folder.

tools.name: export_accepted_media_bundle
tools.description: Copy accepted media into a shareable folder with manifests, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: export_support_bundle
tools.description: Export a diagnostics-only support bundle without photos, videos, thumbnails, vectors, or model files.

tools.name: public_dataset_catalog
tools.description: List supported public benchmark datasets and safe benchmark-only usage guidance.

tools.name: inspect_public_dataset
tools.description: Inspect a local public-dataset folder laid out as identity subfolders.

tools.name: run_public_dataset_benchmark
tools.description: Run an isolated public-dataset benchmark, with confirm=true required for LFW/CFP download or cache reuse.

tools.name: compare_public_dataset_models
tools.description: Compare installed face model packs on the same isolated public-dataset benchmark slice.

tools.name: apply_model_recommendation
tools.description: Apply a benchmark-recommended face model pack and optionally backfill saved references, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: privacy_report
tools.description: Report local face data, generated previews, caches, and audit history.

tools.name: delete_face_data
tools.description: Delete saved faces, possible matches, scan history, previews, and private caches, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: optimize_workspace
tools.description: Remove regenerable preview cache and orphan video frames, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: enforce_storage_budget
tools.description: Clean generated cache to satisfy the configured storage limit, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: model_integrity
tools.description: Verify model folder writability, downloaded archive checksums, Safe Mode model, and decoder readiness.

tools.name: runtime_self_test
tools.description: Run local diagnostics for workspace writeability, decoders, acceleration, Safe Mode, and workspace health.

tools.name: runtime_benchmark
tools.description: Run a local benchmark for vector search, state serialization, and scale database health.

tools.name: benchmark_history
tools.description: Return recent runtime benchmark runs without running a new benchmark.

tools.name: storage_io_benchmark
tools.description: Benchmark metadata I/O in a folder without reading or training on photos.

tools.name: release_readiness
tools.description: Return a local release checklist for models, Safe Mode, signing, updates, and crash reporting.

tools.name: model_distribution_audit
tools.description: Audit model sources, checksums, installed paths, and license review status.

tools.name: backfill_model_references
tools.description: Create active-model embeddings for saved person photos enrolled with another recognizer, requiring confirm=true.

tools.name: installer_self_diagnostics
tools.description: Run first-run installer diagnostics for model download, decoders, Safe Mode, workspace, and packaged backend readiness.

prompts.name: triage_pending
prompts.description: Guide a human-supervised triage pass through pending candidates.
prompts.text: Use the triage_pending MCP prompt from this server.

prompts.name: plan_multi_age_enrollment
prompts.description: Create a consent-first multi-age enrollment plan.
prompts.text: Use the plan_multi_age_enrollment MCP prompt from this server.

prompts.name: safe_mode_policy
prompts.description: Summarize the Safe Mode handling policy for sensitive images and videos.
prompts.text: Use the safe_mode_policy MCP prompt from this server.

workspace.title: Vintrace workspace
workspace.description: Directory where references, review candidates, settings, and audit logs are stored.
